description: This type represents the POI Information Block concerning a parking availability at a given facility.

$references.$comment: This technical specification file (TS) is hereby considered right over the European standard one (EN); meaning that for any difference that may be present between those files this schema will prefer what is defined in the technical specification
$references.name: POIM TS 103 916

$references.$comment: This technical specification file (TS) is hereby considered right over the European standard one (EN); meaning that for any difference that may be present between those files this schema will prefer what is defined in the technical specification
$references.name: CDD TS 102 894-2

message_type.description: Type of the message carried in message property.

source_uuid.description: Unique id all over the world for the message sender.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the message was generated since Unix Epoch (millisecond).

message.description: POI payload — either a structured JSON object (json/raw) or a binary ASN.1 UPER frame (asn1/uper).

oneOf.title: json/raw
oneOf.description: Structured JSON representation of the POI fields.

protocol_version.description: The DE represents an ordinal number that indicates the position of an element in a set

station_id.description: This DE represents the identifier of an ITS-S. The ITS-S ID may be a pseudonym. It may change over space and/or over time

message_id.description: Message identifier. For POI, the value shall be set to poi(3).

parking_availability_block.description: This type represents the POI Information Block concerning a parking availability at a given facility.

wgs84_angle.description: This DF represents an angular component along with a confidence value in the WGS84 coordinate system. The specific WGS84 coordinate system is specified by the corresponding standards applying this DE.

value.description: Unit: 0,1 degree. This DE represents an angle value in degrees described in the WGS84 reference system with respect to the WGS84 north. wgs84North(0), wgs84East(900), wgs84South(1800), wgs84West(2700), doNotUse(3600), unavailable(3601)

confidence.description: Unit: 0,1 degree. This DE indicates the angle confidence value which represents the estimated accuracy of an angle value with a default confidence level of 95 %. The value n (1 ≤ n < 126) indicates the accuracy is equal to or less than n × 0,1 degrees. outOfRange(126), unavailable(127)

poi_block_management_container.description: This type represents the common management container of the POI Information Blocks.

country_code.description: This DE represents an ISO 3166-1 [25] country code encoded using ITA-2 encoding. BIT STRING

provider_identifier.description: This DE represent the identifier of an organization according to the applicable registry

block_identification_number.description: This DE is a general identifier

timestamp.description: This DE represents the number of elapsed (TAI) milliseconds since the ITS Epoch. The ITS epoch is `00:00:00.000 UTC, 1 January 2004`. "Elapsed" means that the true number of milliseconds is continuously counted without interruption, i.e. it is not altered by leap seconds, which occur in UTC

linked_ivims.description: This DF shall contain a list of @ref IvimReference.

items.description: This DF provides the reference to the information contained in a IVIM according to ETSI TS 103 301 [15].

country_code.description: This DE represents an ISO 3166-1 [25] country code encoded using ITA-2 encoding. BIT STRING

provider_identifier.description: This DE represent the identifier of an organization according to the applicable registry

ivi_identification_number.description: This DE represents the identifier of the IVIM

linked_mapems.description: This DF shall contain a list of @ref MapReference.

road_segment.description: This DF represents a unique id for a road segment

region.description: This DE is a general identifier

id.description: This DE is a general identifier

intersection.description: This DF represents a unique id for an intersection, in accordance with ETSI TS 103 301 [15].

region.description: This DE is a general identifier

id.description: This DE is a general identifier

items.description: This DF provides the reference to the information contained in a MAPEM according to ETSI TS 103 301 [15]

related_poi_info_block_container.description: This DF shall contain a list of @ref RelatedPoiInfoBlock and represents a commmon container to refer to other POI Information Blocks.

related_poi_info_block.description: This type can be used to reference to other related POI Information Blocks.

poi_info_block_type.description: This DE represents the identifier of the container type

country_code.description: This DE represents an ISO 3166-1 [25] country code encoded using ITA-2 encoding. BIT STRING

provider_identifier.description: This DE represent the identifier of an organization according to the applicable registry

block_identification_number.description: This DE is a general identifier

timestamp.description: This DE represents the number of elapsed (TAI) milliseconds since the ITS Epoch. The ITS epoch is `00:00:00.000 UTC, 1 January 2004`. "Elapsed" means that the true number of milliseconds is continuously counted without interruption, i.e. it is not altered by leap seconds, which occur in UTC

general_parking_place_container.description: This type represents the General Parking Facility Container.

name.description: The name of the parking facility.

address.description: The address of the parking facility.

phone_number.description: The phone number of the operator of the parking facility.

website.description: The URL of the website of the operator of the parking facility.

parking_status_container.description: This type represents the Parking Status Container.

current_facility_status.description: This DE indicates the opening status. The value shall be set to: closed(0), open(1), subscribersOnly(2), full(3), unknown(15). Values 4-14 are reserved for future use.

parking_supply_capabilities_container.description: This type represents the ParkingSupplyCapabilitiesContainer and is a list of @ref ParkingAreas.

geo_position.description: This DF indicates a geographical position.

latitude.description: Unit: 10^-7 degree. This DE represents the absolute geographical latitude in a WGS84 coordinate system, providing a range of 90 degrees in north or in south hemisphere. unavailable(900000001)

longitude.description: Unit: 10^-7 degree. This DE represents the absolute geographical longitude in a WGS84 coordinate system, providing a range of 180 degrees to the east or to the west of the prime meridian. valueNotUsed(-1800000000), unavailable(1800000001)

altitude.description: Unit: 0,01 metre. This DE represents the altitude value in a WGS84 coordinate system. The value n (−100 000 < n < 800 001) indicates the altitude in units of 0,01 metre. negativeOutOfRange(-100000), unavailable(800001)

delta_position.description: This DF indicates a geographical position with reference to a reference position.

delta_latitude.description: Unit: 10^-7 degree. This DE represents an offset latitude with regards to a defined latitude value. unavailable(131072)

delta_longitude.description: Unit: 10^-7 degree. This DE represents an offset longitude with regards to a defined longitude value. unavailable(131072)

delta_positions.description: This DF shall contain an an ordered sequence of @ref DeltaPosition with respect to the previous position with the first instance referring to a reference position and with the order implicitly defining a direction.

delta_reference_position.description: This DF defines a geographical point position as a 3 dimensional offset position to a geographical reference point.

delta_latitude.description: Unit: 10^-7 degree. This DE represents an offset latitude with regards to a defined latitude value. unavailable(131072)

delta_longitude.description: Unit: 10^-7 degree. This DE represents an offset longitude with regards to a defined longitude value. unavailable(131072)

delta_altitude.description: Unit: 0,01 metre. This DE represents an offset altitude with regards to a defined altitude value. negativeOutOfRange(-12700)

rate.description: Unit: percentage. This DE represents an occupancy rate. The value n (1 ≤ n < 101) indicates the rate in percent. unavailable(101)

trend.description: This DE indicates the trend of occupancy. The value shall be set to: decreasing(0), decreasingQuickly(1), decreasingSlowly(2), increasing(3), increasingQuickly(4), increasingSlowly(5), stable(6), variable(7), unknown(15). Other values reserved for future use.

free_spaces.description: This DE represents a number of parking spaces

total_spaces.description: This DE represents a number of parking spaces

confidence.description: Unit: percentage. This DE represents a confidence level with a default confidence level of 95 %. The value n (1 ≤ n < 101) indicates the confidence in percent. unavailable(101)

parking_area.description: This DF provides information about the parking capabilities and availabilities of a parking identified area.

id.description: This DE is a general identifier

level.description: This DE represents the floor level of the parking area. Negative values indicate underground floors, 0 is the ground level, positive values indicate above-ground floors.

arrangement_type.description: This DE indicates the arrangement of parking space in a parking area. The value shall be set to: parallelParkingSpace(0), diagonalParkingSpace(1), perpendicularParkingSpace(2), queueParking(3), mixed(4), unknown(7). Other values reserved for future use.

access_via_lane.description: This DE is a general identifier

allowed_vehicle_categories.description: The list of vehicle categories allowed in the parking area.

not_allowed_engine_characteristics.description: The optional list of engine characteristics not allowed in the parking area.

allowed_load_types.description: The optional list of load types allowed in the parking area.

not_allowed_load_types.description: The optional list of load types not allowed in the parking area.

height_restriction.description: Unit: 0,1 metre. This DE represents the height of the vehicle, measured from the ground to the highest point, excluding any antennas. In case vehicles are equipped with adjustable ride heights, camper shells, and any other equipment which may result in varying height, the largest possible height shall be used. The value n (1 ≤ n < 126) indicates that the restriction is equal to or less than n × 0,1 metre. outOfRange(126), unavailable(127).

reservation_type.description: The optional parking reservation type(s) associated to the parking area.

items.description: This DE indicates the type of a reservation of a parking space/area

pricing_information.description: The optional pricing information applicable to the parking area.

payment_information.description: The optional payment information applicable to the parking area.

booking_contact_info.description: The optional booking contact information applicable to the parking area.

access_charachteristics.description: The optional access information to the parking area.

free_spaces_position.description: The optional list of positions of free parking spaces, expressed as delta positions relative to the parking area location.

freespaces_id.description: The optional list of identifiers of free parking spaces.

items.description: This DE is a general identifier

parking_areas.description: This DF shall contain a list of @ref ParkingArea.

parking_space_basic.description: This DF provides basic information about the parking capabilities and availabilities of a single parking space.

id.description: This DE is a general identifier

parking_space_detailed.description: This DF provides detailed information about the parking capabilities and availabilities of a single parking space.

id.description: This DE is a general identifier

arrangement_type.description: This DE indicates the arrangement of parking space in a parking area. The value shall be set to: parallelParkingSpace(0), diagonalParkingSpace(1), perpendicularParkingSpace(2), queueParking(3), mixed(4), unknown(7). Other values reserved for future use.

charging_station_id.description: This DE is a general identifier

access_via_lane.description: This DE is a general identifier

access_via_parking_spaces.description: The optional list of identifiers of adjacent parking spaces through which this space is accessible.

items.description: This DE is a general identifier

reservation_type.description: The optional parking reservation type(s) associated to this parking space.

items.description: This DE indicates the type of a reservation of a parking space/area

parking_spaces_basic.description: This DF shall contain a list of ref @ParkingArea.

parking_spaces_detailed.description: This DF shall contain a list of ref @ParkingArea.

parking_space_status.description: This DF indicates the status of parking space
parking_space_status.$comment: This CHOICE has data-carrying variant(s) 'free_until', 'partially_occupied', 'occupied_until', 'reserved_until' that would appear as optional sibling fields in a parent SEQUENCE if this type were used.

parking_occupancy_info.description: This DF indicates the allowed type of occupancy of a parking space/area in terms of time and/or usage
parking_occupancy_info.$comment: This CHOICE has data-carrying variant(s) 'limited_duration', 'only_while_charging_limited_duration', 'parking_allowed_until', 'forced_parking_until' that would appear as optional sibling fields in a parent SEQUENCE if this type were used.

parking_status.description: This DF provides information about the status of a defined type of parking.

vehicle_types.description: The optional list of vehicle categories this status applies to.

reservation_types.description: The optional list of reservation types this status applies to.

items.description: This DE indicates the type of a reservation of a parking space/area

load_types.description: The optional list of load types this status applies to.

parking_fee_types.description: The optional list of applicable parking fee types.

items.description: This DE indicates the applicable type of parking fee

occupancy_types.description: The optional list of occupancy types this status applies to.

parking_status_list.description: This DF shall contain a list of @ref ParkingStatus.

load_type.description: This DF indicates a the load type of the vehicle.

goods_type.description: This DE indicates the type of goods of a vehicle. The value shall be set to: ammunition(0), chemicals(1), empty(2), fuel(3), glass(4), dangerous(5), liquid(6), liveStock(7), dangerousForPeople(8), dangerousForTheEnvironment(9), dangerousForWater(10), perishableProducts(11), pharmaceutical(12), vehicles(13), refrigerated(14). Other values reserved for future use.

dangerous_goods_type.description: This DE indicates the type of the dangerous goods being carried by a heavy vehicle. The value is assigned according to `class` and `division` definitions of dangerous goods as specified in part II, chapter 2.1.1.1 of European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road [3]. explosives1(0), explosives2(1), explosives3(2), explosives4(3), explosives5(4), explosives6(5), flammableGases(6), nonFlammableGases(7), toxicGases(8), flammableLiquids(9), flammableSolids(10), substancesLiableToSpontaneousCombustion(11), substancesEmittingFlammableGasesUponContactWithWater(12), oxidizingSubstances(13), organicPeroxides(14), toxicSubstances(15), infectiousSubstances(16), radioactiveMaterial(17), corrosiveSubstances(18), miscellaneousDangerousSubstances(19)

special_transport_type.description: The DE indicates if a vehicle is carrying goods in the special transport conditions

period.description: This DF indicates a period occuring on defined days of the week.

begin_of_period.description: The opening time of the period in local time (e.g. HH:MM).

end_of_period.description: The closing time of the period in local time (e.g. HH:MM).

periods.description: This DF shall contain a list of up to 8 @ref Period.

time_of_day.description: This DF indicates the time of the day.

hours.description: The hour component of the time of day in local time.

mins.description: The minutes component of the time of day in local time.

eu_vehicle_category_code.description: This DF represents a vehicle category according to the UNECE/TRANS/WP.29/78/Rev.4 [16]. The following options are available:
eu_vehicle_category_code.$comment: This CHOICE has data-carrying variant(s) 'eu_vehicle_category_l', 'eu_vehicle_category_m', 'eu_vehicle_category_n', 'eu_vehicle_category_o' that would appear as optional sibling fields in a parent SEQUENCE if this type were used.

engine_characteristics.description: This DE indicates the engine characteristics (fuel type) of a vehicle. The value shall be set to: noEntry(0), noEngine(1), petrolUnleaded(2), petrolLeaded(3), diesel(4), lpg(5), battery(6), solar(7), hybrid(8), hydrogen(9). Other values reserved for future use.

day_of_week.description: This DE indicates the applicable day(s) of the week

goods_type.description: This DE indicates the type of goods of a vehicle. The value shall be set to: ammunition(0), chemicals(1), empty(2), fuel(3), glass(4), dangerous(5), liquid(6), liveStock(7), dangerousForPeople(8), dangerousForTheEnvironment(9), dangerousForWater(10), perishableProducts(11), pharmaceutical(12), vehicles(13), refrigerated(14). Other values reserved for future use.

parking_fee_type.description: This DE indicates the applicable type of parking fee. The value shall be set to: timeDependentFee(0) to indicate a time-dependent fee (e.g. hourly), flatFee(1) to indicate a flat fee for a certain period (e.g. daily), subscription(2) to indicate a fee included in a subscription (e.g. monthly). Values 3-7 are reserved for future use.

parking_reservation_type.description: This DE indicates the type of a reservation of a parking space/area. The value shall be set to: disabled(0), pregnant(1), womenOnly(2), parentAndChild(3), loadAndOffloadGoods(4), manualElectricVehicleCharging(5), automatedElectricVehicleCharging(6), refrigeratedTransport(7), vip(8), preBooking(9), freeToBeReserved(10), reservationNotPossible(11), automatedValetParking(12), permit(13). Other values reserved for future use.
